scope: Important checked-in upstream/reference inputs and derived review artifacts. This manifest pins local content hashes and records origin evidence without refreshing vendored files or claiming unresolved upstream lineage.

retrievalOrVerification.evidence: references/upstream/mooncatrescue/README.md explicitly says the copied/retrieved date is not recorded.

license.evidence: No license header or upstream license evidence is recorded for this JSON snapshot.

limitations: Origin repository, upstream revision, retrieval date, and license remain unresolved.
